caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark background. She is wearing a light green patterned tunic with a small necklace and a clip-on microphone attached to the neckline. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking and gesturing with both hands in front of her chest. Her mouth opens and closes as she speaks, and her hands move slightly, shifting positions from the first to the last frame. In the bottom-left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". The lighting remains consistent, focusing on the woman, while her expressions and hand placements evolve subtly as she continues her presentation.
